raw_output:
PR #129 review (Claude, Fable 5). Correctness: F1 (P2) — 'the required review-gate CI check' overstates current enforcement: live ruleset 18500043 requires only backend(3.11)/backend(3.12)/frontend/security; neither review-gate nor e2e is required yet (admin step pending). Fix: soften to 'enforced by' or land the ruleset first. F2 (nit) — plain backticks instead of a markdown link, inconsistent with README's other doc references. Verified accurate: artifact path matches spec+CLAUDE.md verbatim; check/job name matches ci.yml; 'including docs-only changes' matches the no-exemptions rule; link target exists on dev and covers the promised content; placement/rendering sane; no other README claim newly contradicted. Observation: pr-129 artifacts absent at review time (expected bootstrap; this battery produces them).
Security: no findings. Docs-only prose; no sinks, no surface; note that advertising 'required' pre-ruleset could create false assurance — same fix as F1.

--- Post-review delta note ---
After this leg's review, one wording fix landed (Claude F1/F2: 'required' -> 'enforced by', backticks -> markdown link) within the same 7-line section; attested hash covers the fixed text. Delta verified: same section, claims now accurate against the live ruleset.

findings.summary: 'required review-gate check' overstates enforcement — ruleset doesn't list it yet
findings.reason: Wording softened to 'enforced by' — true today and after the pending ruleset update.

findings.summary: Spec referenced as inline code instead of a markdown link
findings.reason: Relative markdown link, consistent with the README's other doc references.
